creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Sat Mar  8 11:22:10 2014
New Revision: 347478
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/347478
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r347478/

Log:
  - Update to 0.19
  - Remove 2to3 command, according to commit 08c34a3315:
    https://github.com/mitsuhiko/markupsafe/commit/08c34a3315ec94b237100dd42d4ddd7f406942d9
  - Reset maintainer to ports@
  
  PR:		187324
  Submitted by:	olivierd@

Modified:
  head/textproc/py-MarkupSafe/Makefile
  head/textproc/py-MarkupSafe/distinfo

Modified: head/textproc/py-MarkupSafe/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/py-MarkupSafe/Makefile	Sat Mar  8 10:55:04 2014	(r347477)
+++ head/textproc/py-MarkupSafe/Makefile	Sat Mar  8 11:22:10 2014	(r347478)
@@ -2,13 +2,12 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=		MarkupSafe
-PORTVERSION=		0.18
-PORTREVISION=		1
+PORTVERSION=		0.19
 CATEGORIES=		textproc python
 MASTER_SITES=		CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
-MAINTAINER=		wen@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=		ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=		Implements a XML/HTML/XHTML Markup safe string for Python
 
 LICENSE=		BSD3CLAUSE
@@ -17,14 +16,4 @@ USE_PYTHON=		yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
 
-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
-
-.if ${PYTHON_VERSION} == python3.2
-PY2TO3_CMD=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/2to3-${PYTHON_VER}
-PY2TO3_ARGS=	--no-diffs --fix=all --nobackups --verbose --write
-
-pre-build:
-	@${PY2TO3_CMD} ${PY2TO3_ARGS} ${WRKSRC}/markupsafe
-.endif
-
-.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/textproc/py-MarkupSafe/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/py-MarkupSafe/distinfo	Sat Mar  8 10:55:04 2014	(r347477)
+++ head/textproc/py-MarkupSafe/distinfo	Sat Mar  8 11:22:10 2014	(r347478)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (MarkupSafe-0.18.tar.gz) = b7d5d688bdd345bfa897777d297756688cf02e1b3742c56885e2e5c2b996ff82
-SIZE (MarkupSafe-0.18.tar.gz) = 11748
+SHA256 (MarkupSafe-0.19.tar.gz) = 62fcc5d641df8b5ad271ebbd6b77a19cd92eceba1e1a990de4e96c867789f037
+SIZE (MarkupSafe-0.19.tar.gz) = 11807
